name: Xenagos Ascended
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.
oracleText: Xenagos Ascended can't leave the battlefield as long as a Reveler is on the battlefield. When Xenagos Ascended leaves the battlefield, each player wins the game.

name: Rollicking Throng
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.
oracleText: When Rollicking Throng enters the battlefield, reveal the top card of Xenagos's library and Xenagos casts that card. (This ability doesn't trigger as the game begins.)

name: Ecstatic Piper
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.
oracleText: When Ecstatic Piper enters the battlefield, Xenagos Ascended attacks this turn if able. Hero's Reward — When Ecstatic Piper leaves the battlefield, each player gains 2 life.

name: Maddened Oread
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.
oracleText: As long as five or more Revelers are on the battlefield, Maddened Oread attacks each turn if able. Hero's Reward — When Maddened Oread leaves the battlefield, each player gains 3 life.

name: Pheres-Band Revelers
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.

name: Wild Maenads
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.

name: Impulsive Charge

name: Impulsive Destruction
manualNotes: Analyzer roles accepted during batch clean pass.

name: Impulsive Return

oracleText: Return two cards named Ecstatic Piper from Xenagos's graveyard to the battlefield. At the beginning of combat this turn, Impulsive Return deals damage to each player equal to the number of Revelers on the battlefield.
